classification.safe_delete: Python/editor/system/tmp caches outside protected top-level paths; tmp/bak/swp older than 3 days
classification.safe_compress: old logs/jsonl/out/err only when no active run is detected
classification.safe_move_to_quarantine: intermediate checkpoints and old output queues only when no active run is detected
classification.review_required: large protected assets, unclear files over 1GB, any uncertain checkpoint

review_required.suggested_action: manual review only; do not auto-delete
